headline: Is It Time To Reassess News Corp (NWSA) After Meta AI Licensing Deal?
summary: Wondering whether News at around US$27.04 is priced attractively or if you might be overpaying? This article breaks down what the current share price could mean for long term investors. News has returned 2.7% over the last 7 days and 10.7% over the last 30 days, with a 3.2% return year to date, but a 4.3% decline over the past year and a 65.4% gain over three years. Recent coverage around News has focused on how investors are reassessing media companies in light of changing consumer habits...
